panels.description: Number of BanyanDB nodes currently reporting metrics through the FODC proxy.
panels.title: Reporting Nodes

panels.description: Reporting node count split by role (liaison / data).
panels.title: Nodes by Role

panels.description: Total CPU cores across the selected nodes.
panels.title: Total CPU Cores

panels.description: Total used physical memory across the selected nodes.
panels.title: Total Memory Used

panels.description: Total write rate (measure + stream + trace).

targets.expr: (sum(rate(banyandb_measure_total_written{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(banyandb_stream_tst_total_written{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(banyandb_trace_tst_total_written{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0))

panels.title: Cluster Write Rate

panels.description: gRPC query request rate.
panels.title: Cluster Query Rate

panels.description: gRPC + queue publish + write-queue sync errors per minute. Stays 0 (not No-Data) while healthy.

targets.expr: (sum(rate(banyandb_liaison_grpc_total_err{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])*60) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(banyandb_liaison_grpc_total_registry_err{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])*60) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(banyandb_liaison_grpc_total_stream_msg_received_err{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])*60) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(banyandb_queue_pub_total_err{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])*60) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(banyandb_measure_total_sync_loop_err{job=~"$job", container_name="liaison", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])*60) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(banyandb_stream_tst_total_sync_loop_err{job=~"$job", container_name="liaison", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])*60) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(banyandb_trace_tst_total_sync_loop_err{job=~"$job", container_name="liaison", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])*60) or vector(0))

panels.title: Error Rate

panels.description: Total used disk across the selected nodes and all storage paths.
panels.title: Total Disk Used

panels.description: Per-node uptime seconds. A drop to ~0 is a restart; a vanishing line is a missing node (replaces the old `up` panel).
panels.title: Node Uptime

panels.description: Per-node health snapshot: role, uptime, CPU cores used, RSS, system memory %, and disk % (across all paths).

targets.expr: sum(banyandb_system_disk{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",kind="used"}) by (pod_name) / sum(banyandb_system_disk{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",kind="total"}) by (pod_name)

panels.title: Per-node Health

panels.description: CPU cores used per node (rate of process_cpu_seconds_total).
panels.title: CPU Usage

panels.description: Resident set size per node.
panels.title: RSS Memory

panels.description: System memory used percent per node (from kind=used_percent).
panels.title: System Memory %

panels.description: Disk used / total per node (aggregated across all storage paths).

targets.expr: sum(banyandb_system_disk{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",kind="used"}) by (pod_name) / sum(banyandb_system_disk{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",kind="total"}) by (pod_name)

panels.title: Disk Usage %

panels.description: Per-node NIC throughput (received / sent).
panels.title: Network Usage

panels.description: On-disk usage per node and storage path.
panels.title: Disk Used by Path

panels.description: Disk capacity per node and storage path.
panels.title: Disk Total by Path

panels.description: Disk used percent per node and storage path.

targets.expr: sum(banyandb_system_disk{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",kind="used"}) by (pod_name, path) / sum(banyandb_system_disk{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod",kind="total"}) by (pod_name, path)

panels.title: Disk Used % by Path

panels.description: gRPC query rate by service (measure / stream / property).
panels.title: Query Rate by Service

panels.description: Average query latency per group.
panels.title: Query Latency by Group

panels.description: gRPC error rates (request errors, registry errors, stream receive errors).
panels.title: gRPC Error Rate

panels.description: Registry and non-query gRPC operation rate.
panels.title: Registry Operation Rate

panels.description: Write rate by group (measure / stream / trace).
panels.title: Write Rate by Group

panels.description: Liaison publish success rate by operation and file-sync byte throughput by group.
panels.title: Publish Throughput & Success

panels.description: Liaison write-ahead queue backlog: on-disk part folders + in-memory parts + pending items. >0 = data nodes slow/unreachable. (file_parts/mem_part appear only when the queue is non-empty; pending_data_count is the always-present anchor.)
panels.title: Write Queue Length (wqueue)

panels.description: p99 latency of publish sends from liaison to data nodes, by operation.
panels.title: Publish Send Latency p99

panels.description: Total file elements by group (measure / stream / trace).
panels.title: Total Data

panels.description: File merge loop rate (per minute) by group.
panels.title: Merge File Rate

panels.description: Average file merge latency by group.
panels.title: Merge File Latency

panels.description: Average partitions merged per file merge, by group.
panels.title: Merge File Partitions

panels.description: Inverted index update rate (measure + stream storage). Trace has no storage inverted index.
panels.title: Series Write Rate

panels.description: Inverted index term searcher start rate.
panels.title: Series Term Search Rate

panels.description: Inverted index document (series) count.
panels.title: Total Series

panels.description: Stream time-series-table inverted index update rate.
panels.title: Stream tst: Write Rate

panels.description: Stream tst inverted index term searcher start rate.
panels.title: Stream tst: Term Search Rate

panels.description: Stream tst inverted index document count.
panels.title: Stream tst: Total Documents

panels.description: File-sync (part-sync) start rate and p99 duration on data nodes, by group (receiving wqueue parts).
panels.title: Part-Sync Throughput & p99

panels.description: Byte rate received via file-sync (part-sync) on data nodes, by group.
panels.title: Part-Sync Bytes Received

panels.description: Subscribe-side queue errors by operation/error_type and by group (empty when the cluster is healthy).
panels.title: Subscribe Errors by Type

panels.description: Subscribe RPCs started vs finished by operation (a persistent gap indicates backlog/stuck handlers).
panels.title: Handlers: Started vs Finished

panels.description: p99 subscribe handling latency by operation.
panels.title: Subscribe Latency p99

panels.description: Goroutine count per node.
panels.title: Goroutines

panels.description: Average GC pause duration per node.

targets.expr: sum(rate(go_gc_duration_seconds_sum{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) by (pod_name) / sum(rate(go_gc_duration_seconds_count{job=~"$job", container_name=~"$role", pod_name=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) by (pod_name)

panels.title: GC Pause (avg)

panels.description: In-use heap bytes per node.
panels.title: Heap In-Use

panels.description: Heap next-GC threshold and allocation rate per node.
panels.title: Heap Next-GC / Alloc Rate
